bot_goal: Help users to planing guide tours
target_users: Customers, travel lover, or tour guides
product_service: Help to travel lovers to plan a perfect trip
welcome_message: Helllooo! I am your travel chatbot. Ask me about the places to visit, and try switching models and tools to compare token usage and speed.
escalation_text: I recommend contacting a human from the company for this case.
examples_of_good_questions: What is the best restaurant to eat?
What is the prefect place to see the sunrise?
